screens.name: md
screens.description: This breakpoint is for tablets and small laptop screens. It usually encompasses widths from 600 pixels to 1023 pixels.

screens.name: sm
screens.description: This breakpoint targets devices with small sceens like smartphones. The resolution width varies but typically starts from 320 pixels and below 600 pixels.
